publishedAbstract: * In a large setup, the last few Gluster volumes created cannot be mounted by application pods in Openshift or get healed. When running a `gluster v heal VOLNAME info` command in any such volume, the error observed is: vol_XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX: Not able to fetch volfile from glusterd Volume heal failed. * Why is this issue occurring just for a few volumes, while the rest of them are working fine?
publishedTitle: Why Just a Few Volumes are Failing to Mount and Heal in Openshift Container Storage?
